STREAM X
How to Earn Money 💰
Affiliate Marketing on StreamX
🚀
Turn Your Content into Cash
Post videos, shorts, or images with product links.
When someone buys — you keep 100% of your earnings!
1
Find a Product to Promote
Choose from Daraz, Amazon or Shopify
🛒
Supported Platforms
📦 Daraz.pk
📦 Amazon
📦 Shopify
👉 Open Daraz → find any product → tap Share → copy the link.
👉 Open Amazon → find a product → copy the URL from browser.
2
Upload Content + Paste Link
Add the product link when uploading
📎 Affiliate Link Field
https://www.daraz.pk/products/...
👉 Go to Upload (+ button) → choose Video, Short, or Post.
👉 Scroll down → paste your product link in the Affiliate Link field.
👉 Enter your JazzCash / EasyPaisa number to receive payment.
3
People See Your Content
Viewers click your product link
👀 Someone watches your video
🛍️ They click "Buy Now" on the product
💸 They purchase the item
Every click through your link = your earnings, 100% yours!
More views = more chances to earn. Post regularly for best results.
4
Get Paid
Money goes to your Affiliate Wallet
COMMISSION BREAKDOWN
100% — You 🎉
30% — StreamX
👉 Go to Studio → Earn tab → see your Affiliate Wallet balance.
👉 Tap Withdraw (minimum ₨100) → enter JazzCash or EasyPaisa number.
👉 Admin processes payment within 24–48 hours.
⚡ Pro Tips to Earn More
✅ Promote products related to your content niche
✅ Use Shorts — they get more views and clicks
✅ Show the product in your video for better trust
✅ Post consistently — 1 video/day is ideal
✅ Only promote products you trust — fake products get you banned
⚠️ Important Rules
❌ Do not promote fake or counterfeit products
❌ Do not use misleading thumbnails or titles
❌ Violators will be permanently banned
❌ Commissions from reported products will be cancelled
Report a Product 🚩
Help us keep StreamX safe and authentic
Why Report?
If you find a product link that is fake, counterfeit, misleading, or not as described — report it immediately. Our team will review and take action within 24 hours.

Privacy Policy

Stream x Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 2025

1. Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, profile picture, and content you upload. We also collect usage data including videos watched, liked, and shared.

2. How We Use Your Information

Your information is used to provide personalized content recommendations, improve our algorithm, send notifications about activity on your content, and maintain your account security.

3. Data Storage

All data is stored securely using Google Firebase (Firestore). Media files are stored on Cloudflare R2 and Bunny.net CDN. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

4. Your Rights

You can delete your account and all associated data at any time. You can edit your profile information, delete your uploaded content, and control your notification preferences.

5. Cookies & Local Storage

We use browser local storage to save your theme preference, watch history, and search history. This data stays on your device and is not shared.

6. Content Policy

Users are responsible for content they upload. Stream x reserves the right to remove content that violates our community guidelines including spam, harassment, or illegal content.

7. Contact Us

For privacy concerns, contact us through the Stream x platform. We respond within 48 hours.

By using Stream x, you agree to this Privacy Policy. We may update this policy and will notify users of significant changes.

Terms of Service

Stream x Terms of Service

Effective: April 2025

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using Stream x, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.

2. User Accounts

You must be 13 years or older to use Stream x. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and all activities that occur under it.

3. Content Guidelines

You may not upload content that is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, defamatory, or violates anyone's rights. Spam, fake accounts, and bot activity are strictly prohibited.

4. Intellectual Property

You retain ownership of content you create. By uploading to Stream x, you grant us a license to display and distribute your content on the platform.

5. Live Streaming Requirements

Live streaming requires meeting minimum thresholds: 40 videos, 50 shorts, 100 likes on one video, and 100 followers. These requirements ensure platform quality.

6. Termination

Stream x reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, with or without notice.

7. Limitation of Liability

Stream x is provided "as is." We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the platform.

These terms govern your use of Stream x. Continued use constitutes acceptance of any updates to these terms.

Content Policy

Stream x is committed to keeping the platform safe and positive.

Community Guidelines

✅ Allowed Content

• Original videos, shorts, images and posts
• Educational and informational content
• Entertainment, comedy, gaming, music
• News and current affairs (factual)
• Sports highlights (with permission)
• Islamic content, cultural content

❌ Prohibited Content

• Nudity or sexually explicit content
• Violence, gore or graphic content
• Hate speech or discrimination
• Harassment or bullying
• Spam or misleading content
• Illegal activities or dangerous acts
• Content involving minors inappropriately
• Copyright infringing material

🚩 Reporting Violations

See a violation? Use the 3-dot menu on any video or post and tap Report. Our team reviews all reports within 24-48 hours.

⚠️ Consequences

• First violation: Content removed + warning
• Second violation: 7-day upload restriction
• Third violation: Permanent account suspension
• Illegal content: Immediate removal + report to authorities

Stream x reserves the right to remove any content or account at its discretion to maintain a safe platform for all users.

Copyright Policy

Stream x Copyright Policy

Stream x respects intellectual property rights and expects users to do the same.

What is Copyright Infringement?

Uploading content that you do not own or have permission to use — including music, videos, images, or other creative works — is copyright infringement.

DMCA Policy

Stream x follows DMCA (Digital Millennium Copyright Act) guidelines. Copyright holders can report infringing content and we will review and act accordingly.

What Happens to Violators?

• First violation: Warning issued
• Second violation: Content removed, channel restricted
• Third violation: Account permanently suspended

Fair Use

Commentary, criticism, education, and news reporting may qualify as fair use. However, this does not protect all uses of copyrighted material.

Original Content

Always upload content you created yourself. Use royalty-free music and images from approved sources when creating videos.

Report Copyright Violation

Use the Report button on any video to report copyright violations. Our team reviews all reports within 72 hours.

Protect your original content by uploading it on Stream x. Your content is your property.
